eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Rolette, ND; at 06:59 AM ON MAY 19, 2026 Effective until 06:59 AM MAY 20, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: MISSING JUVENILE: Laela Medina, 16, female, 5'1", 107 lbs., brown hair, brown eyes. Last seen near St. John wearing pajamas and a sweater. If seen or if you have information, call 911 or the Rolette County Sheriff's Office at 701-477-5623.
